Maze Runner

Navigate through a randomly generated maze. Use arrow keys or swipe. Three sizes: 10×10, 15×15, 20×20. Race against the clock.

Use arrow keys or swipe to reach the 🏁
0sTime
---Best

Complete the game to see your score!

How to Play Maze Runner

1

You are the blue dot at the top-left. The green square is the exit.

2

Use arrow keys (↑↓←→) or swipe to move through the maze.

3

Dark cells are walls — you cannot pass through them.

4

Reach the green exit to complete the maze. Choose 10×10, 15×15, or 20×20.

Tips to Improve Your Score

  • Look ahead — plan your path before moving
  • Follow the right-hand wall rule if you get lost
  • Try larger mazes for a bigger challenge
  • Use the full keyboard — you can move fast with arrow keys

Frequently Asked Questions

How are the mazes generated?

Mazes are generated using a depth-first search algorithm, ensuring every maze is solvable and unique. Each maze has exactly one path from start to finish.

How do I control the player?

Use arrow keys (↑↓←→) on desktop or swipe on mobile. The blue dot is your position. Reach the green finish square to complete the maze.

What's a good time?

For a 15×15 maze, under 30 seconds is good. Under 20 seconds is excellent. The best time is saved for each session.

About the Maze Runner

The Maze Runner is one of our most popular brain training exercises. Designed to test and improve your cognitive abilities, this game provides instant feedback on your performance.

Regular practice with this type of cognitive exercise can help improve your mental processing speed, accuracy, and overall brain health. We recommend practicing for 10-15 minutes daily for the best results.

Your scores are saved locally on your device, allowing you to track your progress over time. Challenge yourself to beat your personal best with each attempt!
